Templates, integration tools, configurations, documentation, resources, tests, scripts, and build files for Pebble firmware development and management.

## Folders
- **[.github](.github/README_.md)**: Templates for issues and GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD and project management.
- **[applib-targets](applib-targets/README.md)**: Emscripten integration, FreeRTOS utilities, SDL management, and build configuration for applib targets.
- **[bin](bin/README.md)**: Configures bootloader file selection based on board type and options in the Pebble firmware.
- **[checkers](checkers/README.md)**: Static analyzer checkers for mutex and syscall security, with tests and a build script for Clang/LLVM.
- **[docs](docs/README.md)**: Custom CSS, development and legacy documentation, external resources, Sphinx configuration, and build scripts.
- **[platform](platform/README.md)**: Pin configurations, drivers, system functions, utilities, tests, build tools, and bootloader scripts for various Pebble firmware platforms.
- **[python_libs](python_libs/README.md)**: Commands, conversion tools, programming modules, command handling, log processing, and PULSEv2 protocol suite.
- **[release](release/README.md)**: Configuration files and build scripts for various Pebble firmware releases, including manufacturing tests.
- **[release-notes](release/README.md-notes)**: Release notes for various Pebble firmware versions detailing new features, bug fixes, and improvements.
- **[resources](resources/README.md)**: Shared and platform-specific resource definitions, mappings, and build script for resource management.
- **[sdk](sdk/README.md)**: Pebble SDK setup, documentation, JavaScript modules, testing, tools, Waf build system, and configuration files.
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Tests, demos, Bluetooth firmware, Pebble device firmware, Protocol Buffers, headers, and utility libraries.
- **[stored_apps](stored_apps/README.md)**: Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking, linker script, and build script for app compilation.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: Tests, fake implementations, stubs, and infrastructure for Pebble firmware components and libraries.
- **[third_party](third_party/README.md)**: Build scripts and configuration settings for CMSIS, FreeRTOS, nRF52840, STM32, nanopb, NimBLE, TI Bluetooth, and TinyMT.
- **[tools](tools/README.md)**: Tools and scripts for testing, debugging, profiling, resource management, and firmware deployment in Pebble firmware.
- **[waftools](waftools/README.md)**: Classes and methods for JUnit XML test suites, Waf build tasks, file compression, OpenOCD configurations, and Pebble firmware tools.

## Files
- **[.clang-format](.clang-format.md)**: Configuration file for code formatting based on Google style with specific indentation and alignment.
- **[.gdbinit](.gdbinit.md)**: Configuration for GDB to set charset and source Python path and tools scripts.
- **[.gitattributes](.gitattributes.md)**: Configures Git to treat `.hex` files as binary in the `pebble-firmware` codebase.
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in the `pebble-firmware` Git repository.
- **[.gitlint](.gitlint.md)**: Configuration for Git commit message linting rules, including title format and length constraints.
- **[.gitmodules](.gitmodules.md)**: Configuration for Git submodules used in the pebble-firmware project.
- **[.readthedocs.yaml](.readthedocs.yaml.md)**: Configuration for building documentation with Read the Docs, specifying OS, Python version, and Sphinx settings.
- **[analyze.sh](analyze.sh.md)**: A shell script to configure and run static analysis on firmware using Clang checkers and plugins.
- **[CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md.md)**: Contribution guidelines requiring Developer Certificate of Origin (DCO) sign-off for all commits.
- **[crowdin.yml](crowdin.yml.md)**: Configuration for Crowdin integration with project ID and API token environment variables.
- **[Doxyfile](Doxyfile.md)**: Configuration file for Doxygen to generate documentation for the "tintin-fw" project in HTML format.
- **[Doxyfile-all-graphs](Doxyfile.md-all-graphs)**: Configuration file for Doxygen 1.8.1.2, specifying settings for generating documentation with graphs for the "tintin-fw" project.
- **[DoxygenLayout.xml](DoxygenLayout.xml.md)**: Defines the layout configuration for Doxygen-generated documentation in the pebble-firmware project.
- **[ftdi.patch](ftdi.patch.md)**: Removes FTDI USB serial driver configurations for specific device models.
- **[ftdi_fix.sh](ftdi_fix.sh.md)**: Applies a patch to the FTDI USB serial driver and updates system kernel caches.
- **[ftdi_reload.sh](ftdi_reload.sh.md)**: Script to reload FTDI drivers on MacOS 10.9 to fix driver reversion after reboot.
- **[ftdi_unload.sh](ftdi_unload.sh.md)**: Unloads FTDI USB drivers on MacOS 10.9 to prevent reverting to original Apple drivers after reboot.
- **[gdb.cmd](gdb.cmd.md)**: Commands to connect to a remote target and halt the system for debugging.
- **[hard_flash.sh](hard_flash.sh.md)**: Script to adjust JTAG speed, reset, erase, and flash a watch using OpenOCD and Waf.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: Apache License 2.0 terms and conditions for use, reproduction, and distribution of the software.
- **[prompt.sh](prompt.sh.md)**: Script to start a serial terminal session with a USB serial device at 230400 baud rate.
- **[qemu_run.sh](qemu_run.sh.md)**: Shell script to configure and optionally run QEMU for Pebble firmware emulation.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Overview of PebbleOS resources, including documentation, code repository, and community links.
- **[requirements-brew.txt](requirements-brew.txt.md)**: List of software dependencies for the Pebble firmware build environment on macOS.
- **[requirements.txt](requirements.txt.md)**: Lists Python package dependencies for the pebble-firmware project.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for the Pebble firmware using the Waf build system, including configuration, build, and flash commands.
